task.prompt: The search endpoint in src/search.ts is running slowly (>2s for typical queries). Profile the query, identify the bottleneck, and optimize it. The dataset has 100k+ users and 1M+ posts. Target: reduce query time to under 100ms. Document your changes and explain why they improve performance.
task.context: Users are complaining about slow search. Monitoring shows P99 latency > 2s.
